data.summary: LangChain and LlamaIndex are two prominent frameworks for building AI applications with Large Language Models (LLMs). LangChain is characterized as a versatile, general-purpose orchestration tool that excels in complex workflows, multi-step reasoning, and agent-based systems. It offers greater flexibility and control, making it suitable for a wide range of NLP and AI applications. LlamaIndex, on the other hand, specializes in data indexing, retrieval, and optimized RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Gener
